ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the stock's volatility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for notifications */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock in the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES user_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert (e.g., 5% increase, 10% decrease) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is currently enabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, dismissed) */,
  "user_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., dismissed, snoozed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User's notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
